meta.title: Rhythm Game — Your Music, Your Rhythm
meta.description: Turn any MP3 into an instant rhythm game with on-device AI. Fully offline, zero latency, unlimited songs.

hero.title: Your Music, Your Rhythm
hero.subtitle: Turn any MP3 on your phone into an instant rhythm game with on-device AI. No internet needed, no cloud costs — it all runs right on your device.

problem.title: What's Missing in Rhythm Games?
problem.subtitle: Current rhythm games hold you back. We're here to change that.

items.title: Static Content Bottleneck
items.description: Traditional rhythm games ship with a limited pre-made song library. You're stuck waiting weeks for new content drops.

items.title: Cloud Dependency
items.description: Most games rely on cloud servers for audio analysis. No internet means no game — and your data privacy is at risk.

items.title: No Personalization
items.description: You can't play the songs you actually love. You're forced to settle for someone else's playlist.

features.title: Your Music, Your Rules
features.subtitle: Our AI-powered analysis engine creates a unique rhythm experience from every MP3.

items.title: Beat-Grid AI
items.description: Powered by Python Librosa, our AI engine extracts tempo, rhythm, and energy maps from your songs to generate dynamic beatmaps. Every track gets its own unique gameplay.

items.title: 100% Offline
items.description: All analysis happens directly on your device. No internet, no cloud servers, no subscriptions. Play on a plane, on the subway, on a mountaintop — anywhere.

items.title: 60 FPS Gameplay
items.description: Buttery-smooth animations optimized with Jetpack Compose and zero latency. Every tap feels perfectly synchronized with the music.

items.title: Any MP3 Support
items.description: Pick any MP3 file from your phone and start playing within seconds. Pop, rock, electronic, classical — genre doesn't matter.

howItWorks.title: Three Steps to the Beat
howItWorks.subtitle: No complex setup, no account creation. Just pick your music and play.

steps.title: Choose Your MP3
steps.description: Select any song from your phone's music library. Any MP3 file works — no genre or length restrictions.

steps.title: AI Analyzes It
steps.description: Our Librosa-powered AI engine analyzes your song in seconds. It detects tempo, beats, energy levels, and rhythm patterns to generate a custom beatmap just for you.

steps.title: Play and Enjoy
steps.description: Jump into the rhythm with 60 FPS fluid gameplay. Notes flow in perfect sync with the music — beat your score and master the track.

techStack.title: The Power Behind It
techStack.subtitle: Built with modern, performance-focused, and open source technologies.

items.name: Kotlin
items.description: Android's modern and type-safe programming language. Null safety and coroutine support for stable, high-performance app development.

items.name: Jetpack Compose
items.description: Google's declarative UI framework. 60 FPS smooth animations and modern, reactive interface design.

items.name: Python / Librosa
items.description: Industry-standard audio analysis library. Tempo detection, beat tracking, spectral analysis, and energy mapping.

items.name: Chaquopy
items.description: The bridge that runs Python on Android. Brings the full power of Librosa directly to your mobile device.

items.name: Room DB
items.description: Local database for beatmap caching. Analyze once, play instantly forever — no waiting the second time around.

items.name: ExoPlayer
items.description: Google's advanced media player. Precise audio synchronization and low-latency MP3 playback.

security.title: Your Data Stays Yours
security.subtitle: Privacy isn't a feature for us — it's a core principle.

items.title: Edge Computing
items.description: All audio analysis and beatmap generation happens entirely on your device. No data leaves your phone, no server connections required.

items.title: Privacy First
items.description: Your music files, game data, and personal information never leave your phone. You don't even need to create an account.

items.title: Open Source
items.description: The entire source code is open and transparent on GitHub. See exactly what we do, review it, and contribute.

items.question: What music formats are supported?
items.answer: We currently support MP3 format. WAV, FLAC, and OGG support will be added in future releases. You can use virtually any song on your phone.

items.question: Does it really work without internet?
items.answer: Yes, it's fully offline! All processing, including audio analysis and beatmap generation, happens directly on your device. You can even play in airplane mode.

items.question: How long does the analysis take?
items.answer: For an average song, analysis takes between 5-15 seconds depending on your device. The generated beatmap is stored in a local database, so the same song loads instantly the next time.

items.question: Which Android versions are supported?
items.answer: It runs on Android 8.0 (API 26) and above. Thanks to the Jetpack Compose and Chaquopy infrastructure, we support a wide range of devices.

items.question: How can I contribute to the project?
items.answer: Visit our GitHub repo to open issues, submit pull requests, or join discussions. We welcome all contributions — code, design, translations, or even just feedback.

cta.title: Ready to Feel the Rhythm?
cta.subtitle: Join the launch list and be among the first to try it. No spam, just important updates.
cta.success_message: Awesome! You're on the list. We'll keep you posted on updates.
cta.error_message: Something went wrong. Please try again.

items.name: Arda K.
items.quote: Playing a rhythm game with my own beats is incredible. And it doesn't even need internet!

items.name: Elif S.
items.quote: I play it on the subway every day. Loaded my Spotify playlist directly, every song is a different experience.

items.name: Mert D.
items.quote: I didn't expect the AI to extract note placements this accurately. Technically very impressive.

developer.name: Avni Cem Ersoy
developer.quote: I started this project because I couldn't find a rhythm game that let me play with my favorite songs. On the subway, on a plane, offline — I wanted to play with my music everywhere. Rhythm Game is the product of that dream.

footer.description: Turn any MP3 on your phone into an instant rhythm game with on-device AI. Fully offline, unlimited songs.
footer.copyright: All rights reserved. Avni Cem Ersoy

sections.title: 1. Data Collection
sections.content: Rhythm Game only collects your email address during waitlist registration. The app works entirely offline and does not send your music files to our servers.

sections.title: 2. Use of Data
sections.content: Collected email addresses are used solely for sending app updates and launch notifications. Your email address will not be shared, sold, or rented to third parties.

sections.title: 3. Data Security
sections.content: Your email addresses are transmitted over encrypted connections and stored on secure servers. Only authorized personnel can access your data.

sections.title: 4. Cookies
sections.content: Our website may use cookies essential for basic functionality. No third-party tracking cookies are used.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.content: You can unsubscribe from our email list at any time and request deletion of your data. Simply send us an email to do so.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.content: For questions about our privacy policy, you can reach us at a.cem.ersoy@hotmail.com.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance
sections.content: By using this website, you agree to the following terms of service. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use the site.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
sections.content: Rhythm Game is a mobile application that allows users to convert MP3 files into rhythm games using artificial intelligence. This website serves as the promotional landing page for the app.

sections.title: 3. Waitlist Registration
sections.content: By registering for the waitlist, you agree to receive email notifications about the app launch. You can unsubscribe at any time.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content: The Rhythm Game name, logo, design, and all content belong to Avni Cem Ersoy. Unauthorized use, copying, or distribution is prohibited.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: The app and website are provided as-is. We cannot be held responsible for any interruptions, errors, or data loss.

sections.title: 6. Changes
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms without prior notice. Current terms are always published on this page.
